headline: GE Vernova Stock Rises on Strong Order Growth in Earnings Report
summary: GE Vernova  delivered another strong quarter and raised full-year financial guidance again.  Wall Street was looking for Ebitda of $1.3 billion, from sales of $10.8 billion.  For 2026, GE Vernova now expects sales of about $46 billion and Ebitda of about $6 billion.

headline: GE Vernova’s (NYSE:GEV) Q2 CY2026 Sales Top Estimates, Full-Year Outlook Slightly Exceeds Expectations
summary: Energy transition company GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) reported Q2 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 21.9% year on year to $11.1 billion. The company’s full-year revenue guidance of $46 billion at the midpoint came in 1.1% above analysts’ estimates. Its GAAP profit of $2.47 per share was 22.4% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: GE Vernova’s (NYSE:GEV) Q2 CY2026 Sales Top Estimates, Full-Year Outlook Slightly Exceeds Expectations

The company’s full-year revenue guidance of $46 billion at the midpoint came in 1.1% above analysts’ estimates. Its GAAP profit of $2.47 per share was 22.4% below analysts’ consensus estimates.
